title: Chimlo: Track Codex and Claude Code and respond from your Notch | Product Hunt
excerpt: Chimlo is a free, open-source macOS app that puts Codex and Claude Code in your MacBook notch. See which agents are working, waiting, finished, or failed. Answer Claude Code questions, review permission requests, and check provider usage without hunting through terminal windows. Chimlo also handles media, volume, and brightness controls, with animated pixel companions that make every state easy to spot.
content_html: Chimlo is a free, open-source macOS app that puts Codex and Claude Code in your MacBook notch. See which agents are working, waiting, finished, or failed. Answer Claude Code questions, review permission requests, and check provider usage without hunting through terminal windows. Chimlo also handles media, volume, and brightness controls, with animated pixel companions that make every state easy to spot.
content_text: Chimlo is a free, open-source macOS app that puts Codex and Claude Code in your MacBook notch. See which agents are working, waiting, finished, or failed. Answer Claude Code questions, review permission requests, and check provider usage without hunting through terminal windows. Chimlo also handles media, volume, and brightness controls, with animated pixel companions that make every state easy to spot.

blocks.html_en: Chimlo is a free, open-source macOS app that puts Codex and Claude Code in your MacBook notch. See which agents are working, waiting, finished, or failed. Answer Claude Code questions, review permission requests, and check provider usage without hunting through terminal windows. Chimlo also handles media, volume, and brightness controls, with animated pixel companions that make every state easy to spot.

sentences.en: Chimlo is a free, open-source macOS app that puts Codex and Claude Code in your MacBook notch.
sentences.zh: Chimlo 是一款免费的开源 macOS 应用程序，可将 Codex 和 Claude Code 放入您的 MacBook 中。

sentences.en: See which agents are working, waiting, finished, or failed.
sentences.zh: 查看哪些代理正在工作、等待、完成或失败。

sentences.en: Answer Claude Code questions, review permission requests, and check provider usage without hunting through terminal windows.
sentences.zh: 回答 Claude Code 问题、审查权限请求并检查提供商的使用情况，而无需通过终端窗口进行搜索。

sentences.en: Chimlo also handles media, volume, and brightness controls, with animated pixel companions that make every state easy to spot.
sentences.zh: Chimlo 还可以处理媒体、音量和亮度控制，并带有动画像素同伴，使每种状态都易于识别。

content_html_zh: Chimlo 是一款免费的开源 macOS 应用程序，可将 Codex 和 Claude Code 放入您的 MacBook 中。 查看哪些代理正在工作、等待、完成或失败。 回答 Claude Code 问题、审查权限请求并检查提供商的使用情况，而无需通过终端窗口进行搜索。 Chimlo 还可以处理媒体、音量和亮度控制，并带有动画像素同伴，使每种状态都易于识别。
